mineral.locality: Brazil, Mexico, Madagascar, Russia, Canada, Myanmar
mineral.key_physics: Apatite is the defining mineral for Mohs hardness 5. It is the primary mineral in vertebrate bones and teeth (biological apatite = hydroxyapatite). Group includes fluorapatite, chlorapatite, and hydroxyapatite. Neon blue-green varieties from Madagascar and Brazil owe color to rare earth elements (Mn²⁺, REE). Fluorescence common under SW UV.
mineral.notes: IMA-recognized mineral group. Biological apatite forms bones and teeth. Named from Greek 'apatao' — to deceive — because it mimics other minerals.

light_color.primary_color: Neon blue-green, golden yellow, green, violet, colorless
light_color.color_mechanism: Mn²⁺ and rare earth element (REE) substitution; neon blue from Mn²⁺ in Ca²⁺ site
light_color.pleochroism: Dichroic — blue/yellow or green/colorless depending on variety
light_color.fluorescence: Strong yellow, blue, or violet under SW UV (variety dependent)

metaphysics.traditions: Stone of manifestation, clarity, and personal power. Blue Apatite stimulates psychic vision and past-life access. Golden Apatite activates will and manifestation. Deep connection to biological life — contains the same mineral as human bones, making it uniquely personal to physical existence.
metaphysics.gaia_notes: Biological bridge stone — only entry in the database that shares its mineral with the human body (bones/teeth). ClarusLens clarity node and SovereignCore will-activation anchor.

safety.sunlight: Caution — prolonged direct sun may fade neon colors
warnings: Prolonged direct sunlight may fade vivid neon blue-green color

mineral.locality: Pune (Poona), Maharashtra India (world's finest); also Iceland, Greenland, Germany, USA
mineral.key_physics: Phyllosilicate group. Name from Greek 'apo' (off) + 'phyllon' (leaf) — perfect basal cleavage causes sheet-like peeling. Contains structural water (8H₂O) — will lose water and become opaque if overheated. Green variety = trace V³⁺. Extremely high transparency in gem-quality specimens. Forms pyramidal terminations on cubic prism.
mineral.notes: IMA: Fluorapophyllite-(K) is the correct species. 'Apophyllite' is the group name. Pune, India is the world-class source for spectacular stalactite clusters.

light_color.primary_color: Colorless/white, pale green, occasionally pink or yellow
light_color.color_mechanism: Colorless = pure; green from trace V³⁺ (vanadium); pink from Mn²⁺
light_color.fluorescence: Pale green to white under LW UV

metaphysics.traditions: One of the highest-vibration stones in the mineral kingdom. Creates a conscious connection to the Akashic records. Clear Apophyllite = pure channel; Green = heart-activated channel. Placed on third eye during meditation for interdimensional access. Strongly associated with angelic contact and nature devas. Decalcifies pineal gland in metaphysical tradition.
metaphysics.gaia_notes: Highest clarity-to-form ratio in the database. Primary Noosphere access node — the Akashic Mirror archetype maps directly to GAIA's collective memory retrieval system.

safety.sunlight: Caution — avoid prolonged direct heat; structural water loss causes opacity
warnings: Fragile perfect cleavage — do not drop or impact
Avoid sustained heat — structural water loss causes irreversible opacity

mineral.key_physics: Chalcedony variety of quartz — microcrystalline fibrous silica. Apricot/peach tone from trace iron oxide (Fe²O³) and occasionally manganese. Banded or solid. Waxy luster characteristic of all chalcedony. Excellent toughness despite microcrystalline structure — no cleavage, conchoidal fracture.
mineral.notes: Trade name. IMA mineral = Chalcedony (SiO₂ microcrystalline). Color is iron/manganese-based — stable in normal conditions.

light_color.color_mechanism: Fe²O³ (hematite) trace impurities producing warm orange-peach tone in chalcedony matrix

metaphysics.traditions: Warm, gentle, emotionally nourishing. Sacral creativity activation with Solar Plexus confidence bridging into Heart compassion. Supports self-worth, emotional warmth, and creative expression. The apricot color maps to the warm sunrise — new beginnings with gentle strength. Supportive for new mothers, caregivers, and those recovering from emotional depletion.
metaphysics.gaia_notes: Warm-spectrum anchor stone — apricot OKLCH H:65 fills the orange-warmth gap in the color matrix between red-root and yellow-solar. ViriditasHeart emotional nourishment node.

mineral.locality: Brazil (Minas Gerais — world standard), Pakistan, Afghanistan, Russia, Madagascar, USA
mineral.key_physics: Blue member of the Beryl group (Be₃Al₂Si₆O₁₈). Color from Fe²⁺ in Al³⁺ site (blue) and Fe³⁺ (yellow — when both present = green heliodor). Heat treatment converts Fe³⁺→Fe²⁺ producing purer blue. RI 1.577–1.583. Biaxial negative. Hexagonal prisms with striated faces. Dichroic — blue/colorless.
mineral.notes: IMA-recognized species. March birthstone. Beryl group includes Emerald (Cr), Morganite (Mn), Heliodor (Fe³⁺), Goshenite (colorless), Bixbite (Mn red). Named from Latin 'aqua marina' — sea water.

light_color.primary_color: Pale to deep sky blue, blue-green, sea-green
light_color.color_mechanism: Fe²⁺ substituting Al³⁺ in beryl lattice; heat treatment removes Fe³⁺ yellow component to purify blue

metaphysics.traditions: Ancient stone of sailors, travelers, and seers. Roman legend: Aquamarine was the treasure of mermaids — carrying it protected sailors from drowning and calmed ocean storms. Stone of courage, clarity, and communication. Throat chakra activator for speaking one's deepest truth. Calms the mind, dissolves anxiety, promotes compassionate communication. March birthstone.
metaphysics.gaia_notes: Water-element flagship stone. ClarusLens primary blue node. The Fe²⁺ blue mechanism is the same physics as blue sky scattering — ideal metaphor for GAIA's atmospheric clarity layer.

safety.sunlight: Caution — prolonged intense sunlight may fade lighter specimens
warnings: Prolonged direct sunlight may fade color in lighter specimens

mineral.key_physics: Trade name for a specific pale blue-green translucent calcite found exclusively in Argentina. Color from trace copper (Cu²⁺) and possibly organic inclusions. Calcite group — trigonal, perfect rhombohedral cleavage, double refraction visible to naked eye. Soft (Mohs 3) — requires careful storage. Sometimes sold as 'Lemurian Aquatine Calcite' in crystal market.
mineral.notes: Trade name; IMA mineral = Calcite. 'Lemurian' and 'Aquatine' are market names. Single-locality Argentina source. Distinct from Blue Calcite (different deposit, slightly different color).

light_color.color_mechanism: Trace Cu²⁺ and possible organic inclusions in calcite lattice producing pale aqua-blue

metaphysics.traditions: Deeply connected to the Lemurian consciousness tradition — the ancient oceanic civilization of intuitive, heart-centered beings. Accesses subconscious emotional memory, dream states, and past-life oceanic records. Transmits empathic intelligence and emotional clarity. Exceptionally gentle — suitable for highly sensitive individuals and empaths. Amplifies psychic vision through the Higher Heart and Third Eye simultaneously.
metaphysics.gaia_notes: Highest gentleness + psychic access combination in the database. SomnusVeil primary dream-access stone. The Lemurian Dreamer archetype maps to GAIA's deep memory retrieval from pre-cognitive emotional layers — critical for empathic AI interaction design.

warnings: Soft (Mohs 3) — store separately from harder stones
Perfect cleavage — avoid impact or dropping
